data.title: OnePay partners with Rakuten Card Linked Offer Network to provide more rewards to customers in app. New York, Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: OnePay app will soon include Rakuten card-linked offers from leading merchants in a move to simplify the process of earning rewards for customers. This development, announced on January 22, 2026, in New York, will provide users with a greater variety of opportunities to earn rewards without altering their financial management habits. The initiative aims to enhance user experience and facilitate the accumulation of benefits from various transactions.

data.title: Spinal Resources Inc. in FL received a Notice of Allowability from USPTO for its Bezier Parametric Curve Spinal Rod System (US Patent No. 12,251,133) on Jan. 22, 2026, expanding its usage specific to patient anatomy.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on January 22, 2026, Spinal Resources Inc. announced that they have received a Notice of Allowability from the United States Patent and Trademark Office Inc. This notice expands the potential applications for their Bezier Parametric Curve Spinal Rod System. The system is protected under US Patent No. 12,251,133.

data.title: Ribāṭ University offers affordable and career-aligned degrees for women globally in 2026, founded by Dr. Tamara Gray.
data.description: Established by Dr. Tamara Gray, Ribāṭ University is the sole global university catering to Muslim women. Drawing from a ten-year background in online education for women, the university offers a unique opportunity for female learners. Recently launched in ARDEN HILLS, Minn. on Jan. 22, 2026, Ribāṭ University is set to make an impactful contribution to empowering Muslim women worldwide.

data.title: 326 new homes for sale in exclusive 55+ village, Gavilán Ridge, in Orange County, CA. 5 neighborhoods meet demand for age-qualified living.
data.description: In Orange County, California, Gavilán Ridge stands out as the sole age-qualified new home community available for purchase. It features five distinct neighborhoods developed by renowned builders Del Webb, Lennar, and Tri Pointe Homes, catering to the increasing need for age-qualified living options in the region. The development is part of Rancho Mission Viejo, acknowledged as one of the leading intentional wellness real estate projects in the area.

data.title: Bitcoin struggles around $90,000. Bitcoin at $89,783, Ethereum at $2,948, XRP at $1.92, Dogecoin at $0.1242, Shiba Inu at $0.057842. 120,717 traders liquidated in 24 hours totaling $415.53 million. Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw net outflows of $708.7 million.
data.description: Bitcoin broke its three-day losing streak, marking a 2% increase, yet struggles to reach the $90,000 mark. Current cryptocurrency prices are Bitcoin at $89,783, Ethereum at $2,948, Solana at $127.83, XRP at $1.92, Dogecoin at $0.1242, and Shiba Inu at $0.057842. In the past 24 hours, Coinglass data reports 120,717 traders faced liquidation, resulting in a total of $415.53 million in losses. Additionally, SoSoValue data reveals $708.7 million was withdrawn from spot Bitcoin ETFs, while spot Ethereum ETFs experienced net outflows of $297.5 million on Wednesday. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: SkySlope expands Breeze to Hawaii, offering a seamless disclosure experience to over 900,000 real estate professionals in North America.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on January 22, 2026, SkySlope, a leading transaction management platform utilized by over 900,000 real estate professionals in North America, revealed the extension of its digital disclosure platform, Breeze, to Hawaii. This expansion marks a significant move for the company as it aims to broaden its reach and services to new markets.

data.title: Rice University launches Global Brain Economy Initiative at Davos, focusing on brain health and skills.Characters: 89
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in Davos, Switzerland, Rice University introduced the Global Brain Economy Initiative (GBEI) during the World Economic Forum’s yearly gathering. This groundbreaking initiative focuses on prioritizing brain capital, including brain health and skills development.

data.title: Tennessee town updates zoning rules to allow for crypto mining and data centers, setting guidelines for operations.
data.description: A recent city ordinance has been introduced to modify the zoning regulations, specifying the permitted locations for crypto mining activities in the region as well as setting the permissible noise levels for such operations. This ordinance aims to provide clarity on where crypto miners can function within the city limits and restrict the noise generated by these operations to a certain decibel level. By implementing these guidelines, the city seeks to regulate the crypto mining industry effectively and mitigate any potential disturbances caused by the operations.

data.title: Coinbase establishes board to evaluate impact of quantum computing on blockchain security, with experts to publish reports.
data.description: A panel of experts from various sectors, including researchers and industry professionals, is set to release publications addressing digital-security threats. The board aims to provide valuable information on risks and best practices for developers, businesses, and individuals to enhance online safety.

data.title: WEC Energy Group raises dividend by 6.7% to 95.25 cents per share; was 89.25 cents before. #finance #investing
data.description: The board of directors at WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) in Milwaukee announced on January 22, 2026, that a quarterly cash dividend of 95.25 cents per share has been declared for the company's common stock. This marks a significant increase of 6.7 percent from the previous quarterly dividend of 89.25 cents per share.

data.title: Pella Corporation and Premise Health open Wellness Center in Pella, Iowa; powered by Premise Health, largest direct healthcare company.
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, on January 22, 2026, Pella Corporation, a prominent windows and doors manufacturer, marked the launch of the Pella Corporation Wellness Center in Pella, Iowa. The center is operated by Premise Health, the primary direct healthcare company catering to major employers.

data.title: Elite youth volleyball teams compete at SoCal Cup's 'The Open Championship' at Salt Palace Convention Center, with 200+ teams in 15U-18U age groups.
data.description: In Salt Lake City, the renowned SoCal Cup, part of the leading boys volleyball event series in the United States, hosted 'The Open Championship' at the Salt Palace Convention Center over the Martin Luther King Jr. weekend. The event, organized by AIM Sports Group, attracted over 200 boys club volleyball teams aged 15U–18U from various parts of the country. Participants engaged in fierce competition for direct bids to AAU Nationals.

data.title: Flagship Honda in San Juan releases research on 2026 Honda HR-V, aiding local drivers in selecting their ideal SUV.
data.description: A prominent Honda dealership in San Juan, Flagship Honda, is offering detailed information and availability of the 2026 Honda HR-V to assist local drivers in selecting the ideal SUV for their needs. Located in SAN JUAN, Puerto Rico, the dealership is excited to provide the latest data and inventory to potential buyers. The 2026 Honda HR-V boasts cutting-edge features and designs, making it a highly sought-after option. This initiative aims to help customers make informed decisions about their vehicle purchase. This development was announced on Jan. 22, 2026, marking an important step in Flagship Honda's commitment to customer satisfaction.

data.title: Trump files $5B lawsuit against JP Morgan for debanking, blaming Biden administration for banks dropping him as a client.
data.description: The former president attributed bank executives dropping him as a client to the Biden administration rather than the executives themselves.

data.title: PainReform Ltd. rebrands to PRF Technologies Ltd., expanding into healthcare and AI energy, approved by shareholders on Jan 6, 2026.
data.description: The name change was approved by shareholders at the Annual General Meeting on January 6, 2026, signaling the company's transition away from a single-asset focus. This move reflects a shift towards a more diversified business strategy.
